original: The korgonne raider facing you is a stocky, {furcolor}-furred alien, no more than {height} tall. He wears a thick hide coat with many pockets, and from the fur-lined hood pokes a short, canid nose. His legs are bound in hide wraps, and he stands atop the snow on his large, wide-splayed toes. The pockets of his coat bulge suspiciously... every minute, it seems like he dips into one for a new weapon or tool.
